initial-briefing.subject: PRIORITY: Signal Anomaly Detected
initial-briefing.body:
Agent,

We've detected an anomalous signal originating from an unknown source. Your mission: locate, decode, and report.

Signal coordinates have been uploaded to your terminal.

— Command

signal-critical-alert.subject: CRITICAL: Signal Integrity Failing
signal-critical-alert.body:
AUTOMATED ALERT

Signal integrity has dropped below 25%.
Interference source: INTERNAL

This is not an external signal.
The signal is coming from inside the system.

Recommendation: DECODE IMMEDIATELY
